title: QVanilla
description: Client mods that I use to improve vanilla gameplay in terms of optimization and usability.
body:
This modpack is aimed at optimizing and adding vanilla minecraft. Suitable for playing in singleplayer worlds or on various SMP projects.
### Modpack adds and improves:
- Dynamic lighting
- Voice chat
- World Map
- Shaders
- Sounds
- Zoom
### Optimizes:
- Lighting
- Game logic
- Mobs
- Fixes bugs
